title: Gender Symbols: Copy & Paste ♂ ♀ ⚧ Male, Female & More
meta_description: Copy and paste gender symbols — male, female, transgender, non-binary, neuter, and combined orientation signs. Click any symbol to copy it instantly.
hero_tagline: Male, female, transgender, and every combined gender and orientation sign in Unicode. Click any symbol to copy it instantly.
intro: Gender symbols are used in biology, profiles, pronoun fields, and identity flags. This library collects the core male, female, transgender, and neuter signs, the doubled and interlocking orientation marks, and the relationship signs for marriage and partnership — all as plain Unicode characters you can copy anywhere.

sections.label: Core
sections.intro: The primary signs for male, female, transgender, and neuter.

sections.label: Combined
sections.intro: Doubled and interlocking signs used to represent orientation and gender combinations.

sections.label: Relationships
sections.intro: Signs used in genealogy and records for unions and their dissolution.

related.title: Zodiac Symbols
related.desc: The twelve astrological signs plus planetary symbols to copy and paste.

related.title: Special Characters
related.desc: Unique Unicode symbols with individual meaning and standalone appeal.

related.title: Heart Symbols
related.desc: Heart emojis and Unicode heart characters in every color and style.
